title: SBP Roaming Token JWT Payload
description: The decoded payload of a Roaming Token JWT (HS256). The full token is a compact JWT: base64url(header).base64url(payload).base64url(signature).

sub.description: export_id — references the stored bundle in state_exports.

exp.description: Expiry Unix timestamp. Maximum 7 days after iat (604800 seconds).
